And the non-slip hooks on the top which is better to grip ropes. It keeps tents, pavilions and awnings in place during windy and stormy weather.

📍 [ Easy to Install ]: The Heavy-duty metal tent pegs can be inserted into hard soil or clay by hand, foot, or hammer. And the metal tent pegs are extremely strong to allow you to easily hammer the pegs into soft and hard ground very easily.

description: Product Description HOINYA TENT PEGS The tent pegs at fully galvanised, this means they are protected by a layer of zinc coating to prevent them from rusting. A good helper for outdoor camping, tents, garden barbed wire, etc. Our ground nails are solid structure, with sufficient strength, not easy to break. Feature: 1. Metal tent pegs designed with L hook on the top for convenient attaching rope or for anchoring 2. Tent stake can penetrate and hold firmly in a wide range of soil conditions, you won't be troubled with a windy night anymore 3. The edges of our tent pegs are polished smoothly to be handily stuck into the ground, 7.09 inches length is perfect to keep heavy substances in place Tips: In order to ensure that the pegs hold tents firmly, the angle between the pegs and the ground should keep about 60 degrees, and the pegs' top should be about 3~4 cm from the ground Specifications: Material: Steel Color: Silver Diameter: 4mm / 0.16 inch Length:180 mm / 7.09 inch Weight: 18g/pcs Product include: 10 X Tent pegs The tent pegs are extremely heavy duty and are made from durable and long-lasting carbon steel to ensure long life span and when hammered in they do not bend like others. Anti-slip design of the camping pegs provides real gripping power, Inserted the conic point of tent pegs into the ground to make sure the hook of tent stakes attachment of the rope is at ground level, so these tarp pegs won’t easily come up. The Heavy-duty metal tent pegs, multifarious use, suitable for any type of ground and occasions, can be used for multiple items not just tents. You could use this for canopies, tarps, small dogs, garden nets or fix holiday decorations on the ground.
